description: Default capabilities for the main Drevalis window. Tauri 2 capabilities scope per-origin: ``local: true`` covers the bundled ``tauri://`` SPA, ``remote.urls`` covers the FastAPI server the launcher navigates to. Both are required because the SPA loads from ``http://127.0.0.1:8000/`` in production (so the frontend's relative XHRs to ``/api/v1/...`` reach the same origin) — without the ``remote`` entry, every plugin IPC call (updater check, opener, ...) is rejected with ``not allowed for ACL``.
